name: Cotton Fabrics
seo_applications:
Popular Applications

  • Shirting — Poplin, oxford, chambray in 80-140 GSM
  • Bottom-weights — Twill, canvas, bedford cord in 180-280 GSM
  • Home textiles — Bedsheeting, curtains, upholstery up to 320 GSM
  • Kidswear & workwear — Pre-shrunk washes, enzyme finishing
seo_intro:
Premium Cotton Fabrics — Direct from Mills

Discover 200+ cotton SKUs from verified Indian mills: poplin, twill, canvas, voile, oxford, and more. All fabrics undergo three-step QC with lab-verified GSM, construction, and colour-fastness data.

Bulk MOQ starts at 500 meters. Samples shipped within 48 hours. Payment flexibility via embedded credit lines.
seo_meta_description: Source cotton fabrics from verified Indian mills. 200+ SKUs: poplin, twill, canvas, denim-weight. GSM 80-320, MOQ from 500m.
seo_title: Buy Premium Cotton Fabrics Online — Wholesale Prices
